question:
Rompuses are bitter. Rompuses are yumpuses. Yumpuses are nervous. Yumpuses are jompuses. Jompuses are not blue. Dumpuses are not earthy. Every jompus is an impus. Impuses are bright. Each impus is a numpus. Numpuses are earthy. Every numpus is a vumpus. Wren is a rompus.

Is the following statement true or false? Wren is not earthy.
